name: @puffo-ai/agent-core
description: Local agent core runtime for connecting CLI agents to the product message plane.

scripts.prepack: npm run build && npm run build:native
scripts.test: npm run build && npm run build:native:dev && node --test "dist/tests/**/*.test.js"
scripts.test:native: cargo test --manifest-path crates/agent-native/Cargo.toml && cargo test --manifest-path crates/agent-native/Cargo.toml --features dev-tools && cargo check --manifest-path crates/agent-native/Cargo.toml --features apple-keychain --bin agent-native-sidecar
